# Examples: readme-inventory skill

This file collects usage examples, CLI invocations, and integration patterns for the readme-inventory skill.

## Example 1: Check README Inventory

- To check README inventory sections:

```sh
python scripts/sync-readme-inventory.py --check
```

## Example 2: Write/Update Inventory

- To update README inventory sections:

```text
python scripts/sync-readme-inventory.py --write
```

Add more examples as new tools or scripts are integrated with this skill.
